$description: Per-spec workflow state file. Created in Phase 1, updated every phase/task completion. Location: specification/[spec-index]-[spec-name]/[spec-index]-[spec-name]-workflow-tracking.json

featureName.$description: Human-readable name of the feature, fix, or refactor being implemented

specDirectory.$description: Relative path to the specification directory inside the worktree

worktreePath.$description: Relative path to the git worktree from the project root

startedAt.$description: Timestamp when the workflow was initialized (Phase 1 completion)

phases.$description: Ordered list of all workflow phases and their execution status. Updated by Team Lead on phase start and completion.

id.$description: Phase identifier matching the workflow phase number (0, 1, 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5, 5.3, 5.4, 5.5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 10.5, 11, 12, 13)

status.$note: 'skipped' used for conditional phases like Phase 4 (bugs only) or Phase 5.3/5.4/5.5 selection

completedAt.$description: Timestamp when phase finished (null if not yet complete)

docs.$description: Spec documents produced by this phase (filenames only, relative to spec directory). Empty array for phases that produce no documents.

files.$description: Code/config files changed during this phase, categorized by operation. All paths relative to worktree root. Empty arrays for doc-only phases.

created.$description: Files newly created in this phase

modified.$description: Existing files modified in this phase

tasks.$description: Individual work items within phases. Task IDs use format T{phase}.{seq} (e.g., T8.1, T8.2). Updated on task start, file changes, and completion.

files.$description: Code/config files changed by this task, categorized by operation. All paths relative to worktree root.

created.$description: Files newly created by this task

modified.$description: Existing files modified by this task

updatedAt.$description: Timestamp of last status or file list change

iteration.$description: Tracks Phase 8/9 review loops. Incremented each time Phase 9 review fails and loops back to Phase 8 for fixes.

loops.$description: Number of Phase 8 -> 9 iteration cycles completed. 0 means first pass. Target: < 3 loops (efficiency metric)

lastReviewVerdict.$description: Most recent combined verdict from Phase 9 (code-reviewer + adversarial-reviewer). null before first review.
lastReviewVerdict.$note: Code review uses Approved/Changes Requested/Blocked. Adversarial uses PASS/CONTESTED/REJECT. Record the blocking verdict.

team.$description: Agent team metadata and communication log for the workflow session.

teammates.$description: List of teammate agent types that have been spawned during this workflow (for audit, not live status)

messages.$description: Key inter-agent messages logged for traceability (not exhaustive, only significant coordination events)

to.$description: Receiver agent type or 'all' for broadcast

status.$description: Top-level workflow completion flags. Team Lead sets these during Phase 11-12 transition.

allPhasesComplete.$description: True when all required phases (including 10, 10.5, 11) have status 'complete' or 'skipped'. Set during Phase 11.

allTasksComplete.$description: True when every task in the tasks array has status 'complete'. Set during Phase 11.

workflowDone.$description: True after Phase 12 commit succeeds. Final flag indicating the workflow is fully finished.
